title: Thriller-Pickaxe
description: Adds a powerful Netherite pickaxe that mines a full 3×3 area at once, fully customizable with CustomModelData.
body:
# Thriller – The 3×3 Mining Pickaxe

Thriller introduces a new, customizable pickaxe that mines blocks in a **3×3 area**, making resource gathering faster and more efficient.  
By default, it uses the **Netherite pickaxe texture**, but it also supports **CustomModelData**, allowing resource pack creators and server owners to give it a unique look.

---

## ✨ Features
- ⛏️ **3×3 mining ability** – clear large areas quickly  
- 🎨 **CustomModelData support** – integrate seamlessly with resource packs  
- 🛠️ **Craftable recipe** – obtain it legitimately in survival mode  
- 🔥 **Netherite-based design** – balanced for late-game progression  
- ⚡ **Server-friendly** – lightweight plugin designed for multiplayer  

---

## 📦 Compatibility
- Tested on **Minecraft 1.21.X**  
- Likely compatible with other modern versions
